arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Service Catalog portfolio.

created_time.description: The timestamp of when the Service Catalog portfolio was created.

description.description: A brief text description of the Service Catalog portfolio.

name.description: The name of the Service Catalog portfolio.

provider_name.description: The name of the entity providing the Service Catalog portfolio.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs assigned to the Service Catalog portfolio.
